_comment: Clockcheck allowlist for the 4-wide refactor. Describes intentional refactor effects so rtl_clockcheck.py does not flag them as unexplained divergence. See doc/4wide_refactor_checklist.md and doc/4wide_pivot_plan_2026-04-25.md.
_notes: iq2_count is in ignore_fields in case Stage 2 drops NUM_INT_IQS to 2; remove from ignore list if Stage 2 keeps 3 IQs (current default).
max_cycle_delta_by_seq=50 allows for normal microarchitectural variance per committed instruction; tighten if false-positive resolution is needed.
